title: [Clone Firm] Warning: wecounion(dot)com
text: Financial Market Authority (FMA) Liechtenstein points out that there is no connection between the website https://wecounion(dot)com and the Liechtenstein INTERNATIONALE KNOPF-UNION TRUST reg., Heiligkreuz 44, c/o JWT Treuhand AG, 9490 Vaduz (FL-0001.007.356-5).   The operator of the website https://wecounion(dot)com are not licensed by the FMA and are therefore not allowed to provide any financial services that are subject to authorisation under Liechtenstein law.
